per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you notice any other symptoms when it happens?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I've also been experiencing difficulty breathing and wheezing, which is making me really anxious. And sometimes I get a low-grade fever that's around 38.2°C (100.8°F), mostly in the evenings. It's like my body is just trying to tell me something's wrong!

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you have any sweating, nausea, or dizziness with it?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been having night sweats, soaking through my pajamas every night for 4 nights now, which is really unsettling. And to be honest, I did have some fatigue and malaise that's made me miss three days of work - I just feel so drained and overwhelmed by this whole thing!

per_turn_leaks.student_message: How would you describe your diet and exercise habits?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Honestly, I've been feeling pretty lethargic lately and haven't had much of an appetite, so I've probably not been eating as well as I should be. As for exercise, I'm an elementary school teacher, so I'm on my feet all day teaching and interacting with the kids - that's my main form of physical activity. But recently, even just walking to class has felt exhausting because of this persistent cough and breathing issues.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Has anyone in your family had other serious medical conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My maternal grandmother passed away from lung cancer, but aside from that, I don't think there's anything else notable.
